title: Avoid using Arrays.stream with boxed types for primitive arrays
description: Using Arrays.stream with boxed types for primitive arrays can lead to performance issues. It's recommended to use Arrays.stream with appropriate primitive stream types (IntStream, LongStream, DoubleStream) instead.
recommendation: Use Arrays.stream with appropriate primitive stream types (IntStream, LongStream, DoubleStream) for primitive arrays.
impact: Performance issues due to boxing and unboxing operations.
